name: Wanchese Crab Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, mix together with a fork the first 10 ingredients.
2. Form mixture into 3-inch patties; roll in cracker crumbs.
3. In a skillet or deep fat fryer, heat oil to 375 degrees F.
4. Fry patties until golden brown, about 2 minutes on each side.
5. Drain on paper towels and serve immediately with sauce of choice.
6. Makes 3 servings.
Source: Blue Crab, a Cookbooklet. Shared and MM by Judi M. Phelps. jphelps@shell.portal.com, juphelps@delphi.com, or jphelps@best.com
